name: 55W LED Canopy Light AC 120~277V 5000K
description: The ZION LED USA 55W LED Canopy Light is a compact yet powerful lighting solution, designed for both commercial and residential applications. Operating on a wide voltage range of AC 120–277V, this fixture delivers bright, uniform illumination at a crisp 5000K color temperature—ideal for spaces that require enhanced visibility and safety. Built with energy efficiency and durability in mind, it is perfect for long-term performance in a variety of demanding environments.
short_desc: Features: Wattage: 55W Input Voltage: AC 120–277V Color Temperature: 5000K (neutral daylight) High Luminous Efficiency: Bright output with reduced energy use Overheat Protection: Ensures safe, reliable operation UV & IR Free: No harmful emissions Durable Build: Robust construction for long-lasting performance Applications: Commercial Buildings Parking Garages Gas Stations Industrial Facilities Retail Spaces Educational Institutions
